summary.en: Chile does not have a single EU-style horizontal regime equivalent to CE marking, RoHS, or a dedicated Chile-wide battery regulation in the same form. For products with radio functions, SUBTEL approval is the practical regime to check, while SEC and related sector rules still govern in-scope electrical aspects.
summary.zh: 智利没有与欧盟相同的一体化CE标志制度，也没有同欧洲体系一致的RoHS或电池横向法规。产品具有无线功能时，应按SUBTEL要求核查，而SEC及相关行业规则仍覆盖适用电气安全方面。
summary.zht: 智利沒有與歐盟相同的一體化CE標誌制度，也沒有同歐洲體系一致的RoHS或電池橫向法規。產品具有無線功能時，應按SUBTEL要求核查，而SEC及相關行業規則仍覆蓋適用電氣安全方面。

standards_or_laws: Telecommunications and radio compliance practice under SUBTEL
NCh-referenced EMC and safety alignment expected by market actors
No Chile-specific standalone national RoHS or battery regulation equivalent is broadly cited in this lane

summary.en: China may document EMI/EMC and radio compliance under GB and GB/T routes tied to product category and market destination, and CCC where applicable. These records remain Chinese-side records unless mapped to Chilean requirements.
summary.zh: 中国可在GB/GBT体系并结合CCC在产品类别基础上形成EMC及无线合规文件。这类文件仍属中国侧资料，必须映射到智利要求后才可作为市场依据。
summary.zht: 中國可在GB/GBT體系並結合CCC在產品類別基礎上形成EMC及無線合規文件。此類文件仍屬中國側資料，必須映射到智利要求後才可作為市場依據。

standards_or_laws: China GB 9254 safety-related EMC practice where relevant
GB 9258 radio-related test expectations by category
CCC / GB T compliance dossier when applicable for exported battery products

gap.en: Do not assume CE, RoHS, or one EMC label transfer applies for Chile. The exporter gap is usually claim control and module scope: no EU-style umbrella claim is accepted without Chile-specific evidence for the exact wireless and electrical profile.
gap.zh: 不能假设CE、RoHS或单一EMC标签可直接迁移到智利。差距通常在于声明控制与模块范围，未按智利对应无线和电气特性提供证据的EU式统一声明不应使用。
gap.zht: 不能假設CE、RoHS或單一EMC標籤可直接遷移到智利。差距通常在於聲明控制與模組範圍，未按智利對應無線和電氣特性提供證據的EU式統一聲明不應使用。

mandatory_status.target: Depends on radio/function scope; no blanket EU-style CE/ROHS-style umbrella applies by default to all products.
mandatory_status.cn: China-side EMC and radio documentation is required by category but not a direct Chile exemption framework.

source.publisher: Subsecretaría de Telecomunicaciones (SUBTEL), Government of Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Avoid EU-style all-products statements. Validate SEC, and where wireless is present, SUBTEL-facing tests and claims for Chile import models.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 避免使用欧盟风格的一刀切陈述。应按SEC要求处理电气项，并对含无线产品提供对应SUBTEL核准和模型化声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 避免使用歐盟風格的一刀切陳述。應按SEC要求處理電氣項，並對含無線產品提供對應SUBTEL核准和模型化聲明。
